title: ⚠️ 使用说明：串行两阶段工作流（必读）
description: 个人色彩诊断必须串行执行。Stage 2 不依赖 Stage 1 的图片，而是依赖 Stage 1 分析出的【季节类型文字】。两张图均以用户原始参考图为 edit 输入。

workflow.execution: SEQUENTIAL — Stage 2 必须等 Stage 1 出结果后才能运行
workflow.reference_image: required（正面素颜自拍，自然光，无滤镜，无重度妆容）

dependency_chain.name: 色彩诊断卡 / Color Diagnosis Card
dependency_chain.output_image: 色彩诊断卡 PNG（交付给用户）
dependency_chain.output_text: 季节类型，如 'Soft Autumn / 柔和秋季型'（从图像内容读取，注入 Stage 2）

dependency_chain.name: 综合形象报告 / Personal Image Report
dependency_chain.input_image: 用户原始参考图（不是 Stage 1 的图！）
dependency_chain.input_text: Stage 1 的季节类型文字 → 替换 prompt 里的 [SEASON TYPE] 占位符
dependency_chain.output_image: 综合形象报告大版面 PNG（交付给用户）
dependency_chain.why_not_edit_stage1: Stage 2 若以 Stage 1 的图为 edit 输入，模型会修改色彩卡布局而非生成新报告。正确做法：仍以原始人脸照为 edit 参考，仅在 prompt 文字层注入季节类型

execution_steps: Step 1: 确认用户已提供素颜参考图（正面，自然光，无滤镜）
Step 2: 运行 Stage 1 prompt + 参考图 → 得到色彩诊断卡
Step 3: 从 Stage 1 输出图中读取 / 记录季节类型（如 Soft Autumn）
Step 4: 将季节类型填入 Stage 2 prompt 的 [SEASON TYPE] 占位符
Step 5: 运行 Stage 2 prompt + 同一张原始参考图 → 得到综合形象报告
Step 6: 向用户依次交付两张图
content: 此条目为工作流说明，不含可执行 prompt。请使用下方 Stage 1 和 Stage 2 的 prompt 条目分别执行。

title: Stage 1：色彩诊断卡 / Color Diagnosis Card
description: 韩式个人色彩诊断卡。含季节判定、色彩属性分析、Drape Test 对比、最佳色板。需参考图。GPT Image 2 edit。
content:
Using the uploaded reference photo as the subject, generate a Korean-style personal color diagnosis card (韩式色彩诊断卡).

FIRST, analyze the subject's features from the photo:
- Skin undertone: warm / cool / neutral
- Skin depth: light / medium / deep
- Skin chroma: bright (vivid) / muted (soft)
- Natural hair color temperature: warm / cool
- Eye color clarity: bright / soft

Then, determine the Personal Color Season (12-type Korean system):
Spring: Bright Spring (明亮春) / True Spring (纯正春) / Light Spring (明亮春浅)
Summer: Light Summer (浅夏) / True Summer (纯正夏) / Soft Summer (柔和夏)
Autumn: Soft Autumn (柔和秋) / True Autumn (纯正秋) / Dark Autumn (深秋)
Winter: Dark Winter (深冬) / True Winter (纯正冬) / Bright Winter (明亮冬)

Now generate the card image:

LAYOUT: Portrait format (3:4), white or very light warm gray background, Korean beauty clinic aesthetic, clean grid-based design

TOP HEADER (full width):
  Large centered title: 'PERSONAL COLOR DIAGNOSIS / 个人色彩诊断'
  Season badge below: filled pill-shaped tag '[SEASON TYPE] / [中文季节型]' in season-appropriate accent color

ROW 1 — LEFT (40%):
  Subject's large portrait (exact face from reference photo, natural no-makeup look)
  Below portrait: 2-line italic tagline describing their natural vibe in English + Chinese
  Example: 'Soft contours, refined maturity / 柔和轮廓，精致成熟'

ROW 1 — RIGHT (60%):
  COLOR PROFILE section (3 horizontal gradient bars with position marker):
    HUE: gradient cool blue → warm orange, dot position = their undertone
    VALUE: gradient light → dark, dot = their depth
    CHROMA: gradient muted → vivid, dot = their saturation
  
  BEST COLORS section:
    2-row grid of 8-10 filled circles, season-appropriate color palette
    All colors should harmonize with the analyzed season

ROW 2 — DRAPE TEST COMPARISON (full width):
  Title: 'DRAPE TEST / 色布测试'
  Left panel: subject's face (miniature, from reference) surrounded by warm complementary fabric swatch → label '✓ BEST'
  Right panel: same face surrounded by conflicting color fabric swatch → label '✗ AVOID'
  Each panel labeled with color name (bilingual)

ROW 3 — STYLE KEYWORDS (full width):
  Title: 'STYLE KEYWORDS'
  8 rounded-rectangle tags in 2 rows × 4 columns, bilingual
  Choose season-appropriate keywords (e.g., Soft Autumn → Old Money, Refined, Gentle, Intellectual, Relaxed, Muted Warm, Soft Elegance, Natural)

DESIGN SPECS:
- All text must be legible, precise, bilingual (English label + Chinese sub-label)
- Font: clean modern sans-serif throughout
- Subject's exact facial features retained from reference photo
- Color palette of the card itself should feel consistent with the diagnosed season
- Professional Korean beauty consultation aesthetics, not decorative/cute
- GPT Image 2, high resolution, crisp typography

title: Stage 2：综合形象报告 / Personal Image Report Dashboard
description: 韩式综合形象报告大版面。含穿搭×6、妆容×4区、配饰/眼镜/美瞳/发色×4列、发型×4、体型建议、推荐与避坑。需参考图。GPT Image 2 edit。
content:
Using the uploaded reference photo as the subject, generate a comprehensive Korean-style Personal Image Report dashboard. The same subject's face (exact features from reference) must appear consistently throughout in miniature form across all styling sections.

[SEASON TYPE from Stage 1 analysis] — insert the determined season here.

OVERALL SPECS:
Format: Portrait (3:4 or 1:1.4), white background, Korean beauty consultation document style
Font: Clean professional sans-serif, all section titles in English + Chinese sub-label
Grid: Tight organized sections separated by very thin hairline rules
Color accent: Use season-appropriate muted palette throughout

── TITLE BAR (top, full width) ──
'PERSONAL IMAGE REPORT / 个人形象诊断总报告' — centered, elegant display font

── SECTION 1: HERO ROW (full width, 3 columns) ──
Col A (25%): Large subject portrait — exact face from reference photo, natural look
Col B (40%):
  'SEASON RESULT: [SEASON TYPE]' header
  Season badge in accent color
  3 bullet points describing season characteristics (in Chinese)
  COLOR PROFILE: HUE / VALUE / CHROMA gradient bars with position indicator
  BEST COLORS: 2 rows of 8-9 colored circles
Col C (35%):
  'STYLE KEYWORDS' header
  8 keyword tags in 2×4 grid, bilingual

── SECTION 2: OUTFIT STYLE (full width strip) ──
Title: 'OUTFIT STYLE' left-aligned
6 full-body fashion photos in horizontal row, each featuring the subject's face on a styled model body:
  Outfits 1-6: Different coordinated looks in season-harmonious colors
  Styles: casual elegant, office refined, weekend soft, evening muted, casual chic, classic
Bottom caption strip: 'Key: Define waist · Soft structure · Drape · [relevant silhouette keywords]'

── SECTION 3: MAKEUP GUIDE (right 55%, paired with Accessories left 45%) ──
Makeup Guide title: 'MAKEUP GUIDE'
4 subsections side by side: BROW / EYE / BLUSH / LIP
Each: 1 facial feature close-up photo + 3 color dot swatches with bilingual names
Bottom note: 1-line makeup philosophy in Chinese

── SECTION 4: ACCESSORIES / GLASSES / CONTACT LENSES / HAIR COLOR (4-column grid) ──
Col 1 - ACCESSORIES:
  3 face thumbnail photos with different earring/necklace styles
  2 accessory product photos below
  1-line Chinese description of accessory style
Col 2 - GLASSES:
  3 face thumbnails with different frame styles (round, rectangular, cat-eye)
  1-line Chinese description of frame preference
Col 3 - CONTACT LENSES:
  3 eye close-ups with different lens colors
  Each labeled: English color name + Chinese name
  1-line tagline in Chinese
Col 4 - HAIR COLOR:
  4 hair swatch strips showing recommended colors
  Each: English name + Chinese name
  Colors should harmonize with season

── SECTION 5: HAIRSTYLE / BODY SHAPE (2-column) ──
Left - HAIRSTYLE (50%):
  4 face thumbnail photos with different hairstyle cuts
  Each labeled with English name + Chinese name below
Right - BODY SHAPE GUIDE (50%):
  Text: height/weight reference line
  Body type descriptor
  Simple body silhouette line diagram
  4 small outfit silhouette thumbnails showing flattering shapes
  ✓ checkmarks with shape names: 调腰线 / 上半身有型 / 顺垂面料 / A字/中长裙

── SECTION 6: KEY RECOMMENDATIONS + AVOID (full width, 2 columns) ──
Left - KEY RECOMMENDATIONS:
  5 rows: [icon] English recommendation · Chinese explanation
  E.g.: Muted warm palette 柔和暖色系, Soft texture 柔软自然材质
Right - AVOID:
  5 color swatches or style examples to avoid
  Each labeled with what and why in Chinese
  Examples: 冷色调, 荧光色, 高对比, 过于锐利, 过度闪亮

FINAL QUALITY REQUIREMENTS:
- Subject's exact facial features must be consistent across ALL face appearances
- All Chinese and English text must be perfectly legible and correctly spelled
- The season's color logic must be consistent throughout (if Soft Autumn, all recommended colors must be muted warm tones)
- Professional Korean beauty consultation document feel, not decorative
- GPT Image 2, maximum quality

title: Simple 4-Card Variant（简版四卡方案，来自 @zhongying14）
description: 更轻量的四张独立分析卡替代方案。每张针对一个维度。适合快速生成或不想等大版面的场景。
content:
Generate 4 separate analysis cards from the uploaded portrait photo. Run these 4 prompts sequentially:

Card 1 - HAIRSTYLE ANALYSIS:
Create a hairstyle analysis graphic using this portrait. Show 4 side-by-side hairstyle comparisons to highlight which hairstyles suit the subject best. Include both recommended and not-recommended styles. Labels: style name (English + Chinese), ✓/✗ indicator. Visual-first, minimal text. White background, Korean beauty card aesthetic. 3:4.

Card 2 - COLOR PALETTE ANALYSIS:
Create a personal colour analysis graphic using this portrait. Show side-by-side drape colour comparisons in a diagnostic card format. Determine and display the season type (12-type Korean system). Include: best colours palette (8 swatches), avoid colours (4 swatches), season badge, colour profile bars (Hue/Value/Chroma). Bilingual labels. Professional beauty clinic aesthetic. 3:4.

Card 3 - EYEWEAR ANALYSIS:
Create a glasses/eyewear analysis graphic using this portrait. Show 4-5 side-by-side frame style comparisons to highlight which frames suit the subject best. Include: frame shape name, face shape compatibility note, ✓ recommended / △ neutral / ✗ avoid indicators. Visual-first, minimal text. 3:4.

Card 4 - OUTFIT PATTERN ANALYSIS:
Create an outfit pattern and color coordination graphic using this portrait. Show 5-6 side-by-side outfit comparisons, each with the subject wearing different color tones and patterns. Highlight which palettes enhance vs clash with their coloring. Key: pattern/fabric type, season harmony indicator. Visual-first. 3:4.
